intro: Pilosella sintenisii, also known as Sintenis's mouse-ear hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and improve overall well-being.
